summary: Completed testing of Live Commerce Engine (Go-Live Commerce facade). Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified - admin login, customer login, marketplace, payment pages.
critical_code_review_comments: LiveCommerceService properly excludes MongoDB _id via _clean() method
VAT calculation correctly implemented: subtotal * vat_percent / 100
Idempotency check prevents duplicate order creation on repeated approval
Role-based access control enforced: only finance/admin can approve proofs
Commission trigger integrated via create_commissions_for_order import
seed_data_creation: Created test invoices, payments, and proofs via API during testing (TEST_LIVE_COMMERCE_* prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Commerce Engine fully tested. All 12 backend features verified: health check, product checkout with VAT, payment intent, proof submission, finance queue, full/partial approval, rejection, quote acceptance, customer workspace, idempotency, role-based access. Frontend pages verified: BankTransferPage shows bank details and proof upload, PaymentSelectionPage shows active bank transfer with disabled mobile money, PaymentPendingPage shows pending status with next steps. CartDrawerCompleteFlow handles checkout with liveCommerceApi integration.

backend: POST /api/live-commerce/product-checkout creates invoice with correct VAT (18%) ✓
POST /api/live-commerce/payments/{id}/proof submits proof and changes status to under_review ✓
GET /api/live-commerce/finance/queue returns list of uploaded proofs ✓
POST /api/live-commerce/finance/proofs/{id}/approve with full payment creates order + vendor orders + sales assignment ✓
POST /api/live-commerce/finance/proofs/{id}/approve with partial payment does NOT create order ✓
Idempotency: approving same proof twice does NOT create duplicate order ✓
frontend: Admin login at /admin/login with admin@konekt.co.tz works ✓
Admin dashboard loads with sidebar navigation ✓
Customer login at /login with demo.customer@konekt.com works ✓
Marketplace has Products, Services, Promotional Materials tabs ✓
BankTransferPage at /payment/bank-transfer shows fallback when no state ✓
PaymentSelectionPage at /payment/select shows bank transfer as Active ✓
PaymentSelectionPage shows Mobile Money and Card Payment as Coming Soon ✓
Cart drawer (CartDrawerCompleteFlow) opens with product items ✓
Cart shows Subtotal, VAT (18%), Total correctly calculated ✓
Proceed to Checkout shows checkout step with Contact/Delivery/Invoice details ✓
